_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: chriseichmann
data.message:
Merge pull request #12 from neofarmrocks/dont_install_unused_boost_libs

(sick_safevisionary_driver) Dont install unused boost libs

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ on: [push, pull_request]
 jobs:
   industrial_ci:
     env:
-      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-all-dev'
+      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-dev'
       UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: 'github:SICKAG/sick_safevisionary_base#main'
       ROSDEP_SKIP_KEYS: 'sick_safevisionary_base'
     strategy:

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ on: [push, pull_request]
 jobs:
   industrial_ci:
     env:
-      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-all-dev'
+      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-dev'
       UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: 'github:SICKAG/sick_safevisionary_base#main'
       ROSDEP_SKIP_KEYS: 'sick_safevisionary_base'
     strategy:

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ on:
 jobs:
   industrial_ci:
     env:
-      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-all-dev'
+      BEFORE_BUILD_TARGET_WORKSPACE: 'sudo apt-get install -y libboost-dev'
       UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: 'github:SICKAG/sick_safevisionary_base#main'
       ROSDEP_SKIP_KEYS: 'sick_safevisionary_base'
     strategy:

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 variables:
-  BEFORE_BUILD_UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: "sudo apt-get install -y libboost-all-dev"
+  BEFORE_BUILD_UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: "sudo apt-get install -y libboost-dev"
   UPSTREAM_WORKSPACE: ".upstream_workspace.yaml"
   ROSDEP_SKIP_KEYS: "sick_safevisionary_base"

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ This is the official ROS2 driver for the [Sick safeVisionary2](https://www.sick.
 We use *Boost*'s [lock-free](https://www.boost.org/doc/libs/1_82_0/doc/html/lockfree.html) data structures in this driver.
 You can install them with
 ```bash
-sudo apt-get install libboost-all-dev
+sudo apt-get install libboost-dev
 ```
 
 ## Build and install

@@ -11,7 +11,8 @@
 
   <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
 
-  <depend>boost</depend>
+  <build_depend>libboost-dev</build_depend>
+  <build_export_depend>libboost-dev</build_export_depend>
   <depend>cv_bridge</depend>
   <depend>lifecycle_msgs</depend>
   <depend>rclcpp</depend>

data.author: mikaelarguedas
data.message:
this project uses only Boost lockfree (header-only library), so install only boost headers

Signed-off-by: Mikael Arguedas <mikael.arguedas@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,8 +11,8 @@
 
   <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
 
-  <depend>boost</depend>
   <depend>cv_bridge</depend>
+  <depend>libboost-dev</depend>
   <depend>lifecycle_msgs</depend>
   <depend>rclcpp</depend>
   <depend>rclcpp_lifecycle</depend>

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(sick_safevisionary_ros2)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
+
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Build
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+add_executable(driver_node src/driver_node.cpp)
+target_include_directories(driver_node PUBLIC
+  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
+  $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)
+target_compile_features(driver_node PUBLIC c_std_99 cxx_std_17)  # Require C99 and C++17
+
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Install
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+install(TARGETS driver_node
+  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
+
+install(
+  DIRECTORY launch
+  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME}
+)
+
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Test
+#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # comment the line when a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # comment the line when this package is in a git repo and when
+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -1,2 +1,7 @@
-# sick_safevisionary_ros2
-ROS2 driver for SICK safeVisionary 3D cameras
+# Sick Safevisionary ROS2
+
+
+## Build and Install
+```bash
+colcon build --packages-select sick_safevisionary_ros2 --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# - BEGIN LICENSE BLOCK -------------------------------------------------------
+# - END LICENSE BLOCK ---------------------------------------------------------
+
+# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# \file    driver_node.launch.py
+#
+# \author  Stefan Scherzinger <scherzin@fzi.de>
+# \date    2023/06/22
+#
+# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch_ros.actions import Node
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+    driver_node = Node(
+        package="sick_safevisionary_ros2",
+        executable="driver_node",
+        parameters=[
+            {"a": "/spacenav/twist"},
+            {"b": "/target_wrench"},
+            {"c": "world"},
+            {"d": 50},
+        ],
+        prefix="screen -d -m gdb -command=/home/scherzin/.ros/my_debug_log --ex run --args",
+        output="both",
+    )
+
+
+    return LaunchDescription([driver_node])

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@

+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>TODO: Package description</description>

+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: MGBla
data.message:
Added interfaces for internal sensor data

Signed-off-by: Marvin Große Besselmann <grosse@fzi.de>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(sick_safevisionary_interfaces)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)
+# uncomment the following section in order to fill in
+# further dependencies manually.
+# find_package(<dependency> REQUIRED)
+
+rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
+  "msg/ActiveMonitoringCase.msg"
+  "msg/CameraIO.msg"
+  "msg/DeviceStatus.msg"
+  "msg/FieldInformation.msg"
+  "msg/FieldInformationArray.msg"
+  "msg/GeneralStatus.msg"
+  "msg/IOConfigured.msg"
+  "msg/IODirection.msg"
+  "msg/IOInputValues.msg"
+  "msg/IOOSSDSState.msg"
+  "msg/IOOutputValues.msg"
+  "msg/ROI.msg"
+  "msg/ROIArray.msg"
+  "msg/ROIObservationResultData.msg"
+  "msg/ROIObservationSafetyData.msg"
+  DEPENDENCIES
+    std_msgs
+)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # comment the line when a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # comment the line when this package is in a git repo and when
+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  DEVICESTATUS_DATA_ACTIVE_MONITORING_CASE struct
+uint8 monitoring_case_1
+uint8 monitoring_case_2
+uint8 monitoring_case_3
+uint8 monitoring_case_4

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_ELEMENT struct
+IOConfigured configured
+IODirection direction
+IOInputValues input_values
+IOOutputValues output_values
+IOOSSDSState ossds_state
+uint8 ossds_dyn_count
+uint8 ossds_crc
+uint8 ossds_io_status
+uint16 dynamic_speed_a
+uint16 dynamic_speed_b
+uint16 dynamic_valid_flags

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal DEVICE_STATUS struct
+uint8 status
+GeneralStatus general_status
+uint32 cop_safety_related
+uint32 cop_non_safety_related
+uint32 cop_reset_required
+ActiveMonitoringCase active_monitoring_case
+uint8 contamination_level

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  FIELDINFORMATION_ELEMENT struct
+uint8 field_id
+uint8 field_set_id
+uint8 field_result
+uint8 eval_method
+uint8 field_active

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  FIELDINFORMATION_DATA struct
+FieldInformation[] fields

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal DEVICESTATUS_DATA_GENERALSTATUS struct
+uint8 run_mode_active
+uint8 device_error
+uint8 application_error
+uint8 sleep_mode
+uint8 wait_for_input
+uint8 wait_for_cluster
+uint8 contamination_warning
+uint8 contamination_error
+uint8 dead_zone_detection
+uint8 temperature_warning

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_UNIVERSALIO_CONFIGURED struct
+uint16 pin_5
+uint16 pin_6
+uint16 pin_7
+uint16 pin_8

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_UNIVERSALIO_DIRECTION struct
+uint16 pin_5
+uint16 pin_6
+uint16 pin_7
+uint16 pin_8

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_UNIVERSALIO_INPUTVALUES struct
+uint16 pin_5
+uint16 pin_6
+uint16 pin_7
+uint16 pin_8

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_OSSDS_STATE struct
+uint8 ossd1a
+uint8 ossd1b
+uint8 ossd2a
+uint8 ossd2b

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  LOCALIOS_UNIVERSALIO_OutputVALUES struct
+uint16 pin_5
+uint16 pin_6
+uint16 pin_7
+uint16 pin_8

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal ROI struct
+uint8 id
+ROIObservationResultData result_data
+ROIObservationSafetyData safety_data
+uint16 distance_value

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal ROI_DATA struct
+ROI[] rois

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  ROI_DATA_RESULT struct
+uint8 task_result
+uint8 result_safe
+uint8 result_valid
+uint8 distance_valid
+uint8 distance_safe

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# ROS msg definition for internal  ROI_DATA_SAFETY_DATA struct
+uint8 invalid_due_to_invalid_pixels
+uint8 invalid_due_to_variance
+uint8 invalid_due_to_overexposure
+uint8 invalid_due_to_underexposure
+uint8 invalid_due_to_temporal_variance
+uint8 invalid_due_to_outside_of_measurement_range
+uint8 invalid_due_to_retro_reflector_interference
+uint8 contamination_error
+uint8 quality_class
+uint8 slot_active

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>sick_safevisionary_interfaces</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>TODO: Package description</description>
+  <maintainer email="grosse@fzi.de">ubuntu</maintainer>
+  <license>TODO: License declaration</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <depend>std_msgs</depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>
+  <exec_depend>rosidl_default_runtime</exec_depend>
+  <member_of_group>rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# sick_safevisionary-ros2
+ROS2 driver for SICK safeVisionary 3D cameras
